title: Mawng Mo Vanilla
description: I make a simple mod that add a few stuffs to vanilla minecraft. (Big Thanks to KAUPENJOE Tutorials)
body:
_(Big Thanks to KAUPENJOE Tutorials)_
This mod only requires fabric API (_aren't all fabric mods like that_).
I highly recommend use together with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) since all the weapons in this mod were made with Better Combat in mind.
Also highly recommend using recipe viewing mods like [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi).

## COMBAT
### ARMORS
Added **6** new **armors** sets and some new **Tools** to fill in the progression of vanilla Minecraft. The progression can roughly be like **COPPER** -> iron -> **STEEL** -> **ROSE GOLD** -> **OBSIDIAN** -> diamond -> **SPARKLING OBSIDIAN** or **BURNING QUARTZ** -> netherite.
![all 6 armor sets (I also tweak the texture for diamond and netherite armors)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a044b8829773077f39a9e06b21a0aa4ebea877.png)
_(I also tweak the textures of diamond and netherite armors so it can look a bit more fitting to be the best armor sets)_

some new crafting recipes (if recipes for new armors are not shown then its recipe is the same as vanilla just changing the materials)
![new recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3cb72bc34890e12d46d707cedf9f05a4520898e.png)

### WEAPONS and TOOLS
Added **4** new sets of Tools and new weapons style for all materials.
![recipes for new tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66cd0ba0495b4cc9a2133eb3b8ef4d0fd867b2e.png)

First 2 new weapons are **DAGGER**(faster than SWORD but lower damage) and **HAMMER**(slower than SWORD but higher damage).
3 new two-handed weapons are: (to really get the full benefit and varieties you need BETTER COMBAT)
- **ODACHI**   (fast as sword,     higher damage,  slightly better reach)
- **CLAYMORE** (slower than sword, highest damage, slightly better reach)
- **ANCHOR**   (slowest,           highest damage, much better reach)

All two-handed weapons can be used to block as a shield BUT the **durability** will take **3 times** the amount of damage compare to vanilla shield.

New bows can take longer to fully draw but the arrows will travel faster, farther.
![how some of the weapons look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/317661c5100e0e28f1f3ec0478463784ff9703e5.png)
(_With BETTER COMBAT enable_)

## FOOD and CROPS
Added 2 new types of crop: **TOMATO** and **CABBAGE** (their seeds can be obtained from breaking 3 kinds of new grass which can spawned everywhere, _or you can just break vanilla grasses for a lower chance_) (works well with [Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons) mod that adds different grow speeds depend on seasons)
![new crops and grasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2604a9a5b08ad371a56796e38271e3ca007c25ab_0.webp)

More food recipes added for both vanilla materials only or the combined of both vanilla and modded.
![FOODS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09c5846c58f79212e95214df58aaa514a43d467.png)

## RECIPES
Added some recipes for crafting non-craftable Vanilla Items.
![new recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975229e0e74f38c4cbf9bc9b836c77e25c86248c.png)
(_and many more..._)
